tool_args.label: MTA Board Action Items - October 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority October 2024 MTA Board Action Items

payload.title: MTA Board Action Items
payload.description: MTA Board meeting materials for October 30, 2024, including capital plan amendments, procurement actions, and meeting minutes from September 25, 2024

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA 2010-2014 Capital Program Amendment #7
tool_args.raw_text: This amendment reduces the existing program amount from $31.704 billion to $31.561 billion. Board approval is also requested to send the $28.909 billion Capital Program Review Board (CPRB) portion of this amendment, to that body for its review and approval.

payload.description: Amendment #7 to the MTA 2010-2014 Capital Program, reducing the program amount from $31.704 billion to $31.561 billion. Board approval requested for $28.909 billion CPRB portion.

tool_args.label: MTA 2015-2019 Capital Program Amendment #6
tool_args.raw_text: The proposed amendment decreases the 2015-2019 funding envelope by $294 million, from $33.913 billion to $33.619 billion.

payload.description: Amendment #6 to the MTA 2015-2019 Capital Program, reducing the overall program envelope from $33.913 billion to $33.619 billion. Board authorization to send $30.948 billion CPRB portion to that body.

tool_args.label: MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment #4
tool_args.raw_text: The proposed amendment increases the 2020-2024 funding envelope by $120.9 million from $55.442 billion to $55.563 billion.

payload.description: Amendment #4 to the MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program, increasing total funding from $55.442 billion to $55.563 billion. CPRB portion increases from $52.116 billion to $52.237 billion.

tool_args.label: Penn Reconstruction
tool_args.raw_text: an addition of $46.6 million in funding from NJ Transit and Amtrak for the Penn Reconstruction project

payload.description: Part of the MTA Expansion Program with $46.6 million in additional funding from NJ Transit and Amtrak for the 2020-2024 Capital Program. Element # G81501, budget increasing from $100,000,000 to $146,600,000.

tool_args.label: Interborough Express
tool_args.raw_text: an addition of $58.3 million for the Interborough Express project

payload.description: Part of the MTA Expansion Program with $58.3 million added to the 2020-2024 Capital Program. Element # G80801, new project with $58,261,183 budget. Funded by $43 million from the State of New York (increasing envelope) and $15 million from the federal RAISE grant program.

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway West
tool_args.raw_text: $16.0 million for Second Avenue Subway West

payload.description: Part of the MTA Expansion Program with $16.0 million added to the 2020-2024 Capital Program. Element # G81002, new project with $16,000,000 budget. Funded by $16.0 million from the State of New York.

tool_args.raw_text: Department MTA C&D

tool_args.label: Metro-North ADA Improvements at Three Bronx Stations - Harlem Line
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Metro-North ADA Improvements at Three Bronx Stations – Harlem Line...ADA Upgrades at the Williamsbridge, Woodlawn, and Botanical Garden stations on MNR's Harlem Line

payload.project_name: Design-Build Services for Metro-North ADA Improvements at Three Bronx Stations – Harlem Line
payload.description: ADA Upgrades at Williamsbridge, Woodlawn, and Botanical Garden stations on MNR's Harlem Line. Includes new elevators, staircases, ramps, full platform replacements, new customer information displays, PA, and security systems. Contract to MLJ Contracting Corp for $118,000,000 with 930 calendar days duration.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Concourse Fit-out
tool_args.raw_text: Contract CM014B provides for the fit-out of Grand Central Madison Concourse with the architectural finishes and system elements necessary for the operation as a passenger terminal for the Long Island Railroad.

payload.description: Fit-out of Grand Central Madison Concourse with architectural finishes and system elements for operation as a passenger terminal for LIRR. Modification to resolve claims, reconcile allowance bid items, extend Substantial Completion date from June 26, 2020 to April 14, 2024. Contract CM014B with GCT Constructors, JV. Request: $14,775,107.33.

tool_args.label: Hudson Line Power/Communications/Signal Infrastructure Improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Contract 39881 requires Judlau-TC Electric, JV to design, construct and test replacement infrastructure for power, communications, and signal equipment on Metro-North Railroad's Hudson Line, which was damaged by Hurricane Sandy in 2012.

payload.project_name: Design Build Services for Power/Communications & Signal Infrastructure Improvements (Hudson Line)
payload.description: Design, construct and test replacement infrastructure for power, communications, and signal equipment on Metro-North Railroad's Hudson Line damaged by Hurricane Sandy in 2012. Approximately 30-mile stretch between Bronx and Croton-Harmon. Contract MN-39881 with Judlau-TC Electric, JV. Request: $13,500,000.

tool_args.label: Harmon Shop Replacement Phase V Stage 2
tool_args.raw_text: Contract MN-81933 provides for design and construction of the new Croton-Harmon Shop and associated facilities and equipment at the Croton-Harmon Yard.

payload.project_name: Design and Construction Services for the Harmon Shop Replacement - Phase V Stage 2
payload.description: Design and construction of the new Croton-Harmon Shop and associated facilities and equipment at the Croton-Harmon Yard. Modification to resolve claims for added work and delays. Contract MN-81933 with Skanska-ECCO III 2 JV. Request: $4,240,657.47. Substantial Completion extended from April 30, 2023 to December 29, 2023.

tool_args.label: PTC Data Radios for MNR and LIRR
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad on behalf of itself and Long Island Rail Road requests Board approval to award a noncompetitive estimated quantity contract to GE Grid Solutions, LLC for the supply and delivery of Positive Train Control Data Radios.

payload.project_name: Supply and Deliver PTC Data Radios for MNR & LIRR
payload.description: Noncompetitive estimated quantity contract to GE Grid Solutions, LLC for supply and delivery of Positive Train Control (PTC) Data Radios for Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road. PTC compliance required under federal mandate. Total estimated amount: $3,797,000 (MNR: $1,146,046, LIRR: $2,650,954). Contract term: November 1, 2024 – November 30, 2031.

tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting October 30, 2024
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Board Meeting 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room New York, NY 10004 Wednesday, 10/30/2024 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM ET

payload.description: MTA Board Meeting at 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY 10004. Agenda includes public comment, executive session, capital plan amendments, procurement approvals.

tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting September 25, 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Joint Minutes of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority...Regular Board Meeting Minutes Wednesday, September 25, 2024 8:45 a.m.

payload.description: Regular Board Meeting of the MTA and agencies. Agenda included 2025-2029 Capital Program approval, MTA Open Data Initiative, Chair Lieber's remarks, procurement approvals. Approved $65.4 billion CPRB portion of the 2025-2029 Capital Plan.

tool_args.label: 95% of capital projects on schedule and within budget
tool_args.raw_text: a positive report from the Independent Engineering Consultant indicating that 95% of ongoing capital projects are on schedule and within budget

payload.claim_text: 95% of ongoing capital projects are on schedule and within budget
payload.subject: MTA capital projects
payload.description: Positive report from the Independent Engineering Consultant reported by Chair Lieber at September 2024 Board meeting.

tool_args.label: LIRR and Metro-North on-time performance
tool_args.raw_text: record ridership on the LIRR and Metro-North Railroad and the continued amazing service, with an average of 97% on-time performance

payload.claim_text: Record ridership on the LIRR and Metro-North Railroad and the continued amazing service, with an average of 97% on-time performance
payload.subject: LIRR and Metro-North Railroad
payload.description: Chair Lieber reporting on service performance during UN General Assembly week.

tool_args.label: Student OMNY card usage increase
tool_args.raw_text: increased usage of the new student OMNY card, which saw a 26% rise in a couple of weeks with the beginning of the new school year

payload.claim_text: Increased usage of the new student OMNY card, which saw a 26% rise in a couple of weeks with the beginning of the new school year
payload.subject: student OMNY card
payload.description: Chair Lieber reporting on milestones, including new student OMNY card adoption.
